imageAlt: MTD for Income Tax launchpad on Tax Timeline (MTD-Lite) roadmap item preview image
title: MTD for Income Tax launchpad on Tax Timeline (MTD-Lite)
summaryBody: MTD IT deadlines appear in the tax timeline but we want to enhance them to include filing status and to provide links when quarterly reports are due (or overdue) to the FA mobile web MTD self assessment pages.
detailBody: MTD IT deadlines appear in the tax timeline but we want to enhance them to include filing status and to provide links when quarterly reports are due (or overdue) to the FA mobile web MTD self assessment pages.
